settings.heading: Trending blind boxes and figures
settings.copy: Use this zone for the highest-intent assortment: new drops, giftable best sellers, or collector bundles.

settings.heading: Give the homepage a reason to feel premium before the shopper even clicks a SKU
settings.intro: Use this section to explain the world, the launch plan, and why the storefront feels collectible instead of generic.
settings.featured_heading: Toybeta Vault, a collectible universe with drop-day theater
settings.featured_copy: Frame the brand around artist collabs, serialized releases, and a collector club. This makes the storefront feel like a destination, not just a catalog.

settings.text: Tease the world, the artist, and the hero silhouette.
Open VIP access first with countdown and bundle perks.
Push social proof, rarity cues, and mini-cart upsells on launch day.

settings.heading: Built for hype launches and evergreen catalog sales
settings.copy: The page now carries a stronger narrative arc, from brand promise to launch mechanics to conversion proof.

settings.heading: Story-driven cards with clear tiers
settings.copy: Drop badges, vendor names, and price hierarchy stay clean even when the lineup mixes blind boxes, plush, and premium figures.

settings.heading: Preorder clarity without clutter
settings.copy: Collectors get shipping windows, stock cues, and bundle-friendly CTAs in a format that still feels playful.

settings.heading: VIP capture that feels native
settings.copy: Newsletter and restock hooks slide naturally into the homepage instead of feeling like an afterthought.

settings.heading: Give merch, launch, and retention moments their own editable homepage real estate
settings.copy: These cards work well for seasonal drops, artist collaborations, starter bundles, or VIP list-building pushes that deserve more than a tiny banner.

settings.heading: Toybeta Vault season opener
settings.copy: Anchor the homepage with a campaign card that sells the universe, countdown, and bundle logic in one place.

settings.heading: Starter shelf bundles
settings.copy: Pair blind boxes with a premium figure or accessory so the homepage also nudges average order value.

settings.heading: Collector club signup
settings.copy: Promote restock alerts, member-only drops, and behind-the-scenes content without burying the value in the footer.

settings.heading: Make the homepage editable where real merchants actually want control
settings.copy: This section gives a merchant-friendly home to assortment strategy, gifting cues, and premium tier framing that often changes every launch cycle.
settings.lead_heading: Use one bigger merchandising callout to frame the entire assortment
settings.lead_copy: Good merchants want to rewrite this area often: new gifting angle, fresh price ladder, current launch story, or a push toward collector bundles.

settings.heading: Surface price ladders early
settings.copy: Help shoppers self-select from impulse-friendly, core, and premium tiers before they start filtering.

settings.heading: Pair worlds with products
settings.copy: Use editable copy to tie characters, artists, or seasonal narratives directly to what is for sale now.

settings.heading: Keep preorder reassurance close
settings.copy: Swap this block as launch timing changes so the homepage always reflects the latest shipping or stock guidance.
